items.title: Olivia Miles is the fastest player in WNBA history to reach 500 PTS and 150 AST, doing it in just 26 games 🤯
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Olivia Miles is the fastest player in WNBA history to reach 500 PTS and 150 AST, doing it in just 26 games 🤯

She breaks the previous marks set by Paige Bueckers (28 games) and Caitlin Clark (29 games).

items.title: Olivia Miles has had an answer for most coverages, intrigued to see how defenses want to deal with her and Napheesa Collier in pick and roll. Storm switched, scrammed out of the matchup and that's...still a lot of space for Phee to work with.

items.title: I was one of the media voters. Went 6-for-6 on the frontcourt selections here and my guards were Paige, Miles, Rhyne and Plum. Thought about taking off KP for Caitlin but decided it wasn't fair to punish KP for getting injured at the exact time ballots were due. It all worked out
items.author: Sean Highkin
items.body_excerpt: I was one of the media voters. Went 6-for-6 on the frontcourt selections here and my guards were Paige, Miles, Rhyne and Plum. Thought about taking off KP for Caitlin but decided it wasn't fair to punish KP for getting injured at the exact time ballots were due. It all worked out in the end.

items.title: Wings try to add more pressure on Olivia Miles, hard show in P&R and Shepard holds. Miles looks to drive the other way and it's contained. Problem is the Lynx will keep it moving and once they get you in rotation it's tough.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Wings try to add more pressure on Olivia Miles, hard show in P&R and Shepard holds. Miles looks to drive the other way and it's contained. Problem is the Lynx will keep it moving and once they get you in rotation it's tough. 

Reject vs the show opens the roll, pass, kick for 3

items.title: Pick and roll for Olivia Miles, defense stays on the side to protect the pocket pass and then it's a late switch. Weakside pulls in on the roll, skip to McBride for 3.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt: Pick and roll for Olivia Miles, defense stays on the side to protect the pocket pass and then it's a late switch. Weakside pulls in on the roll, skip to McBride for 3.

items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: The Sixers' first Exhibit 10 contract of the summer! What is an E10 deal, and what should you know about Duke Miles? www.phillyvoice.com/source-sixer...

media.title: Source: Sixers signing Vanderbilt guard Duke Miles to Exhibit 10 contract
media.description: Duke Miles' six-year collegiate career has included stops at High Point, Troy, Oklahoma and Vanderbilt.

items.title: Miles, 24, played at Troy, High Point, Oklahoma and Vanderbilt across six collegiate seasons. Led SEC with 2.6 steals per game last season while shooting 90.1 percent on free throws. Shot 9.5 three-point attempts per 100 possession last season (34.8 percent). Interesting profile.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Miles, 24, played at Troy, High Point, Oklahoma and Vanderbilt across six collegiate seasons. Led SEC with 2.6 steals per game last season while shooting 90.1 percent on free throws. Shot 9.5 three-point attempts per 100 possession last season (34.8 percent). Interesting profile.

items.title: NEWS: The Sixers are signing Duke Miles to an Exhibit 10 contract, source tells @phillyvoice.com. An E10 deal is a training camp contract which gives the player a signing bonus if they are waived and report to that team's affiliate in the G League. Vandy On SI reported earlier to
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: NEWS: The Sixers are signing Duke Miles to an Exhibit 10 contract, source tells @phillyvoice.com. An E10 deal is a training camp contract which gives the player a signing bonus if they are waived and report to that team's affiliate in the G League. Vandy On SI reported earlier today.
